creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2010-11-23 15:58:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/davmail         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/davmail/files   davmail.sh.in 
  Log:
  DavMail POP/IMAP/SMTP/Caldav/Carddav/LDAP Exchange Gateway
  
  DavMail is a POP/IMAP/SMTP/Caldav/Carddav/LDAP exchange gateway
  allowing users to use any mail/calendar client (e.g. Thunderbird
  with Lightning or Apple iCal) with an Exchange server, even from
  the internet or behind a firewall through Outlook Web Access.
  
  WWW: http://davmail.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/151803
  Submitted by:   John Prather <john.c.prather@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1042    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +45 -0     ports/mail/davmail/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/mail/davmail/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/davmail/files/davmail.sh.in (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/mail/davmail/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +83 -0     ports/mail/davmail/pkg-plist (new)
